name: mattfalahe/hr-manager
description: HR Manager - Two Faces - The new era of recruitment for SeAT. A public recruitment funnel for applicants and a director-side assessment console for tracking member health, classifying activity, and running purge workflows. Pure consumer of SeAT-synced data and Manager Core EventBus / PluginBridge - no ESI calls of its own.

suggest.mattfalahe/manager-core: Enables cross-plugin pricing, EventBus pub/sub, Mining Manager + Corp Wallet Manager integrations, and shared SDE/Appraisal services. HR Manager works standalone without it.
